Jan 19, 2024

The developer has enabled AI Generated Content in this game.

AI Generated Content Disclosure

The developer describes how they've used AI generated content: Some game assets including textures and concept art were generated with the assistance of AI image generation models. No AI content is generated live during gameplay.

Pre-Generated AI Content: Yes

Live-Generated AI Content: No
